title: caladenia moschata
intro: Caladenia moschata, commonly known as the musk orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Australia. As a medicinal herb, Caladenia moschata has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing coughs and relieving skin irritations, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Caladenia moschata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through distillation to create a fragrant essential oil.
